# Sainik School Guide India - Full Content Reference

> India's most comprehensive Sainik School directory. AISSEE preparation tips, school information, admission guides, and daily articles for defense aspirants.

## About This Site

Sainik School Guide India (sainikschooleastsiang.in) is a free educational resource for parents and students preparing for AISSEE (All India Sainik School Entrance Exam). The site covers all 33+ Sainik Schools across India with detailed information on admissions, fees, facilities, and preparation strategies.

- **Target Audience**: Parents of students aged 10-15, defense aspirants
- **Language**: Hinglish (Hindi + English in Latin script)
- **Content Type**: Educational guides, school profiles, preparation tips
- **Update Frequency**: Daily new articles

## AISSEE Quick Reference

| Detail | Class 6 | Class 9 |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Age Limit | 10-12 years | 13-15 years |
| Questions | 125 | 150 |
| Total Marks | 300 | 400 |
| Duration | 2 hours | 2.5 hours |
| Subjects | Math, GK, Language, Intelligence | Math, English, Intelligence, Science, Social Studies |
| Negative Marking | None | None |

## Sainik Schools in India

### Currently Covered on This Site

1. **Sainik School Amaravathinagar** - Tamil Nadu, Est. 1962
2. **Sainik School Kapurthala** - Punjab, Est. 1961
3. **Sainik School Rewa** - Madhya Pradesh, Est. 1962
4. **Sainik School Chittorgarh** - Rajasthan, Est. 1961
5. **Sainik School Korukonda** - Andhra Pradesh, Est. 1962
6. **Sainik School Gopalganj** - Bihar, Est. 1964

### Fee Structure (Approximate)

| Component | Annual Amount |
|-----------|---------------|
| Tuition | ₹85,000 - ₹90,000 |
| Hostel | ₹42,000 - ₹48,000 |
| Mess | ₹55,000 - ₹65,000 |
| Uniform | ₹12,000 - ₹15,000 |
| Books | ₹8,000 - ₹12,000 |
| **Total** | **₹2,00,000 - ₹2,50,000** |

### Scholarship Available

- SC/ST: Up to 50% fee concession
- Defence Personnel Wards: Up to 25% concession
- War Widows: Up to 50% concession
- Merit-based: State and central government schemes

- NDA After Sainik School: Complete Career Path
- Sainik School Hostel Life: What to Expect
- Sainik School vs Military School: Key Differences

### Financial
- Sainik School Scholarship 2027: Fee Concession Guide

## Official Resources

- NTA AISSEE Portal: https://exams.nta.nic.in/sainik-school-society/
- Sainik Schools Society: https://sainikschoolsociety.in
- National Scholarship Portal: https://scholarships.gov.in
